transcript.text:
[People waiting in line]
[Wonju's Best Fish Roe Soup Restaurant]
[They can change it to "Country's Best"]
[This is Our #1 Fish Roe Soup]
[That's just crazy]
Can I add more roe?
[More...?]
[More Fish Roe]
How do you eat so much with such a small body?
[This is a piece of cake]
I've never seen someone eat this much
[Same here...]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Wonju today
There's a really famous fish roe soup restaurant here in Wonju
Possibly the country's most famous fish roe spot

I've been wanting to come here for a long time now And I finally get to try it!
You see that over there?
That's the waiting line for the restaurant
[Always a waitlist to prove its popularity]
[Ggachi Doongji] [Gangwon, Wonju]
Up to how many servings can I get?
4 servings
4 servings is a lot
[Ordered 4 servings with 2 extra orders of roes]
I wanted to add 10 more orders, but they said it will overflow
So I got that just for now
They were so quick to set up my table
I only added 2 orders for now
But I plan on adding more after
I tried eating here 3 times before and failed every time because of the wait
I finally got a chance to wait in line for this

It's a lot of food, BUT
-You can ask us to package the leftovers for to-go -Really?
Take it to-go
Thank you
[Here it comes!]
[The Visuals...]
I totally forgot it comes with mugworts
I should've told them to not include these
I'll take these out, I'm sorry
[A little adjustment]
[Clean]
[Close it up]
When is it ready?
I'll let you know
Thank you
I need to save stomach space for the soup

[Eating a meal with the appetizers]
Delicious
[Open it up]
[The soup looks so refreshing]
Can I try some soup? When is it ready? I want it
I'll help you a little
Cook it for about 2 more minutes and it's ready
[Mugwort OUT]
-Do you not like those? -I don't like its scent
Finally! It's finally ready
Bon appetit
Soup first
Refreshing
Just a sec, I want some more soup
Nice and hot Since it's so cold out these days
I think that's why people come here more It warms me up

Fans gave me drinks
Thank you so much
My favorite drinks
Now for the roe
It's completely filled
Look at all these So many!
So big and chunky Look at this
Dip in soy sauce
It's not dry at all
So soft Once you bite into the chewy layer
And the inside just...
Goes crazy
When these come in seafood soups, they tend to be pretty dried up
But these are very juicy
I feel like they're not bunched up
But every single bit of it is on their own

With some soup
[Fell in love with fish roe]
That's so good It's crazy
Is it supposed to be this tender?
[I need to get this on film!]
[She notices now]
Must try the intestines too
These are so soft too and not dry
How's it this soft? No way
That's so good
[Eating non-stop]
[Dip a spoonful of rice]
And a bite of fish roe
[Showing how soft they are]
[Fish roe over rice]
[And some spicy soup]

[Intestines with soy sauce]
I was too disgusted to eat these at first
But these are actually really tasty
It's just that they look unappetizing They're usually very yummy
Grab 2 pieces
Excuse me, can I add more roe?
[You're eating more...?]
4 more orders, please
4 more orders?!
Really?!
-Don't you want to do 2 instead? -2 orders?
Then how about 3?
-3? -2?
[Just what are these women doing?]
[Negotiated into 3 orders]
No mugworts, right?

No mugworts
How many servings?
4 servings+5 extra orders So 9 servings
[Is this some kind of a joke?]
How do you eat so much with such a small body?
[Extra orders of roe]
Thank you
[Just like new]
Let's eat the guts first
With some soup
[Cooking the fish roes]
[Half roe, half soup] This over here is the real deal
Real fish roe soup
There are different types of soup to go with roe
I think spicy is the best fit for these
-Can I eat this now? -Yes

Thank you
It's soft just like this
You see this?
It's best when it first comes out
Let's take some out It's too hot
It's so soft that it explodes
Don't they age these raw with salt/spice?
Yes, you're right
I love these
All the roes are so good
I'm starting to feel bad now
How many are there?
[Just eat it]
But it's so good
[So good at eating]
[The soup gets more flavorful over time]

[She's eating at the same pace]
With some rice
Dip it in here
So good
They don't have anything else Just fish roe soup
It says "Wonju's Best Fish Roe Soup Restaurant"
They can change it to "Country's Best"
Thank you
Can you digest it well?
I digest really fast
Really?
You're pretty
Thank you
Dip in here
Mushroom
Squid

Rice
I've never seen anyone eat this much
[We're used to it now]
Put some soup in here
Fish roe too
And mix it up
[What a beautiful combination of rice and fish roe soup]
This is the real fish roe rice
The others are fish roe rice too, but
This is half roe half rice
This is a little different from eating raw fish roe
How do I explain this?
Rice is so savory
[The owner approaches]
Do you want this?
[Don't know what to do]

This is on the house
Thank you so much
Thank you
[So how many servings is that now?]
4 servings, 2 extras,
5 more extras
This is on the house
[So 10 servings total]
[That's ridiculous]
She's so good at eating
[All cooked and ready while they chit-chat]
These freshly cooked roes are so delicious
These ones are so good
[4 servings with 6 extra orders of roe?]
[She's sad that there's no more left...]
That's so tasty

Let's finish these up
Look at the color of the soup
The soup is full of flavor
That's amazing!
Soup
[Is she drinking the rest too?]
The last bowl of soup is the best because there are pieces of roe at the bottom
It's spicy and flavorful from being cooked for a long time
It's very savory
And the soup had pieces of roe
You can chew on the bits
That's so good
I'm shocked
Where does it all go?
She ate all of that?
Come take a photo

[Photo time with all of them]
She doesn't even have a belly
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
